label: Two capture modes: deterministic router-replay (hint-free by construction, CI gate) + live dispatch trace (behavioral); A-vs-B divergence is itself a finding
Resource-load instrumentation = parse the per-iter executor tool log the runtime already emits; MUST canonicalize all file-touch verbs (Read+Bash cat/rg+Grep+Glob), not just Read
Canary/sentinel tokens in references separate opened-vs-consumed and survive lossy logs; analogue of BIG-bench canary GUID; measure perturbation first
Held-out expected-resource key: derive from RESOURCE_MAP, store out-of-band scorer-only, two parts (expected_resources + expected_routing)
Contamination channels enumerated w/ controls; keyword leak is provably fatal because both routers are literal substring matchers (if keyword in text)
Repo-specific leak: advisor/hook brief already names the skill in-context; harness MUST strip it from dispatched agent and capture advisor_recommend out-of-band as D1
Decontamination as an auditable admission gate: contamination linter reusing routers' own matcher + two-author prompt/key separation to break circularity
Validity controls: hinted-vs-hint-free calibration arm, decoy-skill negative control, k-run repeatability (benchmark-stability.cjs), blind-to-rubric
Maps onto existing seams: reuse dispatch-model.cjs + existing .out logs; net-new is parse-resource-loads.cjs + skill-benchmark scorer + fixture prompt/expected split (Lane B pattern)
RQ2-RQ6 interaction: rename moves the strings the contamination linter+canaries+parser roots key on; derive denylist/roots from live metadata, never hard-code
